lang.name: English
dashboard.title: Console · GrubDrops
dashboard.heading: Console
dashboard.reload_confirm:
Reload all accounts?

This stops every account's current watch/claim activity and restarts all watchers from scratch (re-discover campaigns, re-pick streams). Server-side drop minutes are kept.
dashboard.alert_awaiting_connect: has a whitelisted live campaign, but the external account isn't linked. Connect it so watch-time counts.
dashboard.alert_no_games: authenticated, but no games are whitelisted yet, so there's nothing to mine. Add a game to start.
dashboard.alert_no_drops: sleeping with 0 enrolled drops. Re-authenticate with a device code so Twitch enrolls this account in drops.
dashboard_modal.no_eligible: No active whitelisted campaigns right now.
dashboard_modal.no_events: No events tagged with this account yet.
campaign_modal.linked_title: external account linked — drop can be issued
campaign_modal.not_linked_title: external account NOT linked — drop blocked
campaign_modal.ext_not_linked_desc: Twitch can't issue this drop until you link the required external account (e.g. Mojang for Minecraft, Battle.net for Diablo). Watcher skips the campaign until linked.
campaign_modal.no_eligible_accounts: No account has this campaign's game whitelisted.
drops.title: Drops · GrubDrops
drops.heading: Drops
drops_table.no_games_desc: drops discovery only crawls games you opt into, so nothing shows up until you add one. Add a game to the global priority list, or per account, and discovery will start populating this page.
drops_table.no_past: No past drops yet. Once a whitelisted campaign ends — or you claim a drop — it shows up here.
drops_table.no_current: No in-flight whitelisted campaigns. Discovery populates this list each time a watcher polls.
drops_table.no_upcoming: No upcoming whitelisted campaigns announced yet.
drops_table.action_only: only action-required drops — nothing to auto-collect
drops_table.no_campaign_id: No campaign id — claim-history row only.
drops_table.mark_linked_confirm: Mark this campaign linked and reload watchers so the bot starts mining it?
drops_table.mark_linked_title: I've linked this account — mark it linked so the bot attempts to mine it.
drops_table.no_item_details: No item details available for this campaign.
drops_table.all_whitelisted: All discovered campaigns are on at least one whitelist.
drops_table.no_game_title: this campaign reports no game — nothing to whitelist
campaign_items.no_items: No items recorded for this campaign yet.
history.title: History · GrubDrops
history.heading: History
login.title: Login · GrubDrops
setup.title: Setup · GrubDrops
setup.intro: This is the only credential to control the miner.
accounts.title: Accounts · GrubDrops
accounts.heading: Accounts
accounts.check_auth_title: Probe every account's auth (Twitch token / Kick cookies) now.
accounts.reload_confirm: Reload all watchers? This restarts every account's current watch/claim activity (re-discover, re-pick). Server-side drop minutes are kept.
account.title: Account · GrubDrops
account.heading: Account
account.twitch_hint: Twitch login is device-code only. You get a short code, open twitch.tv/activate on any browser signed into the Twitch account for {{.DisplayName}}, and approve it. No password or cookies pass through GrubDrops; a new session replaces the old one.
account.kick_hint: Kick auth needs real browser cookies (the API rejects automated logins). Re-authenticate opens the cookie form. Existing session is overwritten.
account.games_hint: The watcher only mines campaigns whose game appears here. Top of the list is mined first.
account.no_games_selected: No games selected — pick from the right
account.priority_hint: Order in the left column = mining priority.
account.add_by_name_desc: whitelist a game before discovery surfaces it
account.use_global_confirm: Clear this account whitelist and follow the global priority list?
account.use_global_desc: clears the account override — watcher reads Settings → Global priority
new_account.title: New account · GrubDrops
new_account.heading: // accounts / new
new_account.display_name_desc: a friendly label shown across the UI — for Twitch the real account is whoever approves the device code on the next screen
settings.title: Settings · GrubDrops
settings.heading: Settings
priority.no_global: No global priority set — pick from the right
priority.order_hint: Order in the left column = mining priority for accounts without an override.
priority.mode_meta: How accounts pick the next campaign
notify.heading: Notifications
notify.progress_step_desc: when "progress" is on, notify at 0% (start), every N%, 100% · 50 = start/50/100 · 0 = off · applies on reload
security.any_user: Any user authenticated by your identity provider
security.env_vars_enable: environment variables to enable SSO. See the README "Single sign-on (OIDC)" section.
runtime.heading: Runtime
logging.heading: Logging
logging.retention_desc: how long log history is kept
experimental.heading: Experimental
proxy.heading: Proxy Settings
proxy.enabled_desc: Route all external requests through the proxy
proxy.url_desc: Supports http://, https://, and socks5:// protocols
flash.proxy_invalid_url: invalid proxy URL — must start with http://, https://, or socks5://
experimental.ws_desc: = pure WebSocket, no browser (experimental — may earn nothing until the WS path is proven) ·
experimental.auto_desc: = try WS, switch to Chrome if it stops accruing · applies on reload
health.heading: Heartbeat Health Checker
canary.twitch_channel_desc: Twitch channel slug to probe — leave empty to skip
canary.kick_channel_desc: Kick channel slug to probe — leave empty to skip
canary.interval_desc: how often the canary runs (0 = disabled)
login_kick.title: Kick login · GrubDrops
login_kick.intro: Kick has no public OAuth, so GrubDrops replays your kick.com session. Export your cookies once with a browser extension and paste them here — when discovery logs cloudflare / 401 the cookies have gone stale; re-export and paste again.
login_kick.click_export: click the extension's icon and hit
login_kick.pick_file: Pick the downloaded file below — or open it and paste everything into the box.
login_twitch.title: Twitch login · GrubDrops
login_twitch.intro: Open the URL in a browser logged into the throwaway Twitch account, enter the code, confirm.
login_twitch_paste.title: Twitch login · GrubDrops
login_twitch_paste.intro: Twitch's integrity gate rejects web-issued auth-tokens — gql returns
login_twitch_paste.only_android: Only Android-issued OAuth tokens pass. Two paths below; the first is the only one that fully unlocks drops.
login_twitch_paste.device_code_desc: Mints an Android-issued OAuth token via Twitch's official device-code flow. The miner injects it as the
login_twitch_paste.cookie_in_sidecar: cookie in the sidecar tab so gql + PubSub both unlock.
login_twitch_paste.device_hint: Opens activate.twitch.tv with a 6-character code. ~30 seconds.
login_twitch_paste.in_any_browser: in any browser and sign in.
login_twitch_paste.paste_below: Paste below. Web-issued tokens do not pass integrity — device-code is preferred.
login_twitch_paste.raw_paste_desc: (optional — name=value lines, overrides empty fields above)
flash.settings_saved_reload: settings saved — reload watchers (or restart) to apply the new cadence
flash.notifications_saved_reload: notifications saved — reload watchers to apply the progress milestone step
flash.kick_watch_saved: Kick watch mode saved — reload watchers (or restart) to switch paths
flash.new_password_short: new password must be at least 8 characters
flash.account_added: account added — click Apply changes to start mining
flash.account_whitelist_cleared: account whitelist cleared — now follows global priority
flash.kick_cookies_persisted: Kick cookies persisted — watcher will verify shortly
notify.no_webhook: no webhook configured — set a global or per-account webhook and Save first
login_twitch_cookie.title: Twitch cookie import · GrubDrops
login_twitch_cookie.intro: Import a Python pickle cookie file (cookies.jar) to authenticate. The file should contain a valid auth-token from Twitch.
login_twitch_cookie.step1: Export your Twitch cookies as a Python pickle file (cookies.jar) using a browser extension or script.
login_twitch_cookie.step2: The file must contain at least an auth-token cookie for .twitch.tv domain.
login_twitch_cookie.step3: Upload the file below to import the cookies.
login_twitch_choose.title: Twitch login · GrubDrops
login_twitch_choose.intro: Choose how you want to authenticate with Twitch.
login_twitch_choose.device_code_desc: Mints an Android-issued OAuth token via Twitch's official device-code flow. The most reliable method.
login_twitch_choose.device_hint: Opens activate.twitch.tv with a 6-character code. ~30 seconds.
login_twitch_choose.cookie_import_desc: Import a Python pickle cookie file (cookies.jar) containing your Twitch auth-token.
login_twitch_choose.cookie_hint: Upload a .jar or .pkl file with your Twitch cookies.
login_twitch_cookie.error.parse_pickle: Failed to parse pickle file — ensure it's a valid Python pickle SimpleCookie
login_twitch_cookie.error.no_auth_token: No auth-token found in cookie file — the file must contain a Twitch auth-token
login_twitch_cookie.error.persist: Failed to save session — check server logs
error.platform_no_login_post: platform does not accept login POST
error.invalid_interval: interval must be a non-negative integer
error.csrf_reload: reload the page to get a fresh token and resubmit
error.csrf_https_no_secure: request looks like HTTPS but GRUB_SECURE_COOKIES=0 — set GRUB_SECURE_COOKIES=1 when serving over HTTPS / behind a TLS-terminating proxy
error.csrf_secure_http: GRUB_SECURE_COOKIES=1 but this request arrived over plain HTTP — the session/CSRF cookie is dropped by the browser; either serve over HTTPS (set X-Forwarded-Proto on your proxy) or set GRUB_SECURE_COOKIES=0
